caption: A person is seen preparing to open a collection of trading card packs. In the initial scenes, a hand reaches toward a stack of black "OBSIDIAN" card packs resting on a red and orange surface featuring the "JASPYS" logo and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM". To the right, a small inset video window shows a man with short brown hair wearing a black jacket, sitting in a room with shelving in the background. As the sequence progresses, the person moves a clear plastic wrapper containing more "OBSIDIAN" packs onto the table. The man in the inset window remains visible, observing the process. The background remains a consistent red and orange branded playmat with "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM" prominently displayed throughout the action.
